name: vercel-ai-reasoning
title: Streaming Reasoning
author: Vercel
description: A streaming-aware reasoning disclosure with rich content and lifecycle behavior.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Added reduced-motion classes to disclosure transitions.
Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Used Motion's reduced-motion preference to stop the repeating shimmer and render a static state.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Added reduced-motion classes to disclosure transitions.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
